entryType: direct entry into central living space with immediate access to all zones
kitchenLocation: central-north position, open to dining area, adjacent to laundry and pantry
bedroomLayout: split bedroom layout with master on right side and secondary bedroom on left side for privacy
bathroomPlacement: ensuite bathroom in master bedroom, shared hall bathroom accessible from main living area and secondary bedroom
efficiencyNotes: open kitchen-dining concept maximizes central space
back-to-back plumbing between bathrooms reduces costs
laundry room positioned near kitchen for utility efficiency
pantry adjacent to kitchen optimizes food storage
walk-in closet in master maximizes bedroom floor space
uniqueFeatures: kitchen island provides additional counter space and storage
dedicated laundry room rather than closet
separate W.I.C. (walk-in closet) and W.C. (water closet) in master suite
dimensionNotes: rectangular footprint approximately 41'2" x 28'2" maximizes interior space, bedrooms appear well-proportioned, central living area creates spacious feel despite 1000 sqft constraint
